symptoms.description: Machine does not spin during final cycle
Excessive vibration and banging noise
Water remains in drum after cycle completes
Error code E21 displayed on panel
Washer stops mid-cycle with error E21 after firmware update

failure_modes.name: Worn Drive Belt
failure_modes.description: Drive belt has stretched or snapped, preventing drum rotation.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Disconnect power before removing rear panel. Belt tension can snap fingers.

failure_modes.name: Failed Drain Pump
failure_modes.description: Pump impeller blocked or motor burned out, preventing water evacuation.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Residual water may leak when opening filter. Place towels and unplug unit.

failure_modes.name: Unbalanced Load Sensor Fault
failure_modes.description: Suspension rods or shock absorbers degraded, triggering imbalance shutdown.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Do not bypass safety sensor. Machine may walk across floor if forced to spin.

failure_modes.name: Drain Pump Impeller Debris (Bulletin)
failure_modes.description: Field bulletin: residual debris after E21 firmware change causes intermittent pump stall.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Follow OEM bulletin PPE and isolation steps.

diagnostic_steps.description: Run empty spin cycle and listen for motor engagement.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Motor hums but drum does not rotate

diagnostic_steps.description: Inspect drive belt through rear access panel.
Check drain filter and run pump test mode.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Pump does not activate or makes grinding noise

diagnostic_steps.description: Inspect suspension rods for play and oil leakage.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Rods loose or shocks leaking fluid

diagnostic_steps.description: Inspect impeller for debris per OEM bulletin TB-AH-WM-2026-07

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced worn drive belt; spin restored.
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Customer reported 6 months of intermittent spin failure. Belt showed heat cracking.

historical_resolutions.description: Cleared coin blockage and replaced drain pump.
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Coin jam caused pump burnout. Recommended pocket-check habit.

historical_resolutions.description: Cleared impeller debris and reseated pump per bulletin; E21 cleared
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Technician closed per OEM bulletin TB-AH-WM-2026-07.

historical_resolutions.description: Drive belt replaced; spin cycle restored.
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Belt heat-cracked. Standard warranty repair.

historical_resolutions.description: Cleared impeller debris and reseated pump per bulletin; E21 cleared
Approved drain pump replacement under warranty.
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Customer provided video of standing water. Pump test confirmed failure.

historical_resolutions.description: Cleared impeller debris and reseated pump per bulletin; E21 cleared
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Warranty claim closed using OEM bulletin TB-AH-WM-2026-07.

error_codes.description: Drain timeout — pump or blockage fault

symptoms.description: Dishes come out wet and cold
Standing water at bottom after cycle
Grinding noise during wash phase
Detergent dispenser does not open
Dishwasher beeps and will not start dry cycle after door latch service kit

failure_modes.name: Heating Element Failure
failure_modes.description: Heating element open circuit; water does not reach sanitizing temperature.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Element remains hot briefly after cycle. Allow 30 min cool-down before service.

failure_modes.name: Clogged Drain Hose
failure_modes.description: Kinked or blocked drain hose prevents complete drainage.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Water in sump may contain food debris. Wear gloves.

failure_modes.name: Wash Impeller Obstruction
failure_modes.description: Glass shard or bone fragment jamming circulation pump impeller.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Sharp debris risk. Disconnect power and water supply first.

failure_modes.name: Door Latch Switch Drift (Bulletin)
failure_modes.description: OEM bulletin: revised latch microswitch can mis-report door closed after kit install.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Follow OEM bulletin PPE and isolation steps.

diagnostic_steps.description: Run rinse-only cycle and measure outlet water temperature.
Inspect drain hose for kinks behind kick plate.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Hose pinched or filled with grease buildup

diagnostic_steps.description: Remove lower spray arm and check impeller chamber.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Foreign object visible or impeller does not spin freely

diagnostic_steps.description: Test detergent dispenser solenoid with multimeter.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: No continuity on wax motor solenoid

diagnostic_steps.description: Check latch continuity and bulletin torque on strike plate

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced heating element; sanitizing temperature restored.
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Hard water scale contributed to element burnout. Advised monthly descale.

historical_resolutions.description: Removed glass fragment from impeller; noise eliminated.
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Customer loaded chipped glass. Recommended pre-rinse inspection.

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced latch switch per CleanWave bulletin; dry cycle restored
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Technician closed per OEM bulletin TB-CW-DW-2026-07.

historical_resolutions.description: Removed glass shard from circulation pump impeller.
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Impeller housing scratched but functional. Advised pre-rinse.

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced latch switch per CleanWave bulletin; dry cycle restored
Replaced latch switch per CleanWave bulletin; dry cycle restored
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Warranty claim closed using OEM bulletin TB-CW-DW-2026-07.

symptoms.description: Microwave runs but food stays cold
Arcing/sparking inside cavity
Convection fan not running
Door latch feels loose
Microwave runs but turntable stalls intermittently with click

failure_modes.name: Magnetron Failure
failure_modes.description: Magnetron filament or high-voltage diode failed; no microwave energy produced.
failure_modes.safety_notes: HIGH VOLTAGE. Capacitor retains charge. Only certified technicians should service.

failure_modes.name: Damaged Waveguide Cover
failure_modes.description: Grease buildup on mica waveguide cover causing arcing and burn-through.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Do not operate with damaged cover. Arcing can damage magnetron.

failure_modes.name: Convection Fan Motor Failure
failure_modes.description: Fan motor bearing seized; convection bake mode ineffective.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Unit may overheat in convection mode. Stop use until repaired.

failure_modes.name: Turntable Coupler Wear (Bulletin)
failure_modes.description: Bulletin: coupler wear on 2024–2025 builds causes intermittent stall under load.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Follow OEM bulletin PPE and isolation steps.

diagnostic_steps.description: Heat cup of water for 60 seconds on high power.
Inspect waveguide cover for burn marks or holes.
Run convection bake at 180°C and listen for fan.
Check door switch continuity with door closed.
Inspect coupler and roller ring; replace if flats present

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced waveguide cover; arcing stopped.
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Grease splatter from uncovered dish caused cover damage.

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced magnetron after confirmed HV diode failure.
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Unit out of warranty. Customer opted for repair over replacement.

historical_resolutions.description: Installed bulletin coupler kit; turntable continuous
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Technician closed per OEM bulletin TB-HP-MW-2026-07.

historical_resolutions.description: Installed bulletin coupler kit; turntable continuous
Waveguide cover replaced; arcing resolved.
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Grease buildup on mica cover. Not magnetron failure.

historical_resolutions.description: Installed bulletin coupler kit; turntable continuous
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Warranty claim closed using OEM bulletin TB-HP-MW-2026-07.

symptoms.description: Washer does not spin at all during cycle
Clothes extremely wet after final spin
UE error — unbalanced load repeated
4E or 5E water supply error displayed
Samsung washer 4E on spin after control board firmware F/W 3.2

failure_modes.name: Clogged Pump Filter / Drain Blockage
failure_modes.description: Pump filter obstructed preventing drain before spin phase.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Unplug unit; residual water in filter housing.

failure_modes.name: Drain Hose Siphoning / Install Fault
failure_modes.description: Incorrect drain hose depth causes siphoning; washer cannot drain.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Drain hose must be 6-8 inches into standpipe.

failure_modes.name: Drive Motor or Inverter Fault
failure_modes.description: Motor does not engage after drain completes; calibration fails.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Certified technician for motor/inverter service.

failure_modes.name: Hall Sensor Noise After FW 3.2 (Bulletin)
failure_modes.description: Samsung field bulletin: hall sensor harness routing causes 4E after FW 3.2.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Follow OEM bulletin PPE and isolation steps.

diagnostic_steps.description: Clean front-load pump filter and verify impeller turns freely.
Verify drain hose 6-8 in standpipe, no airtight seal, 18-96 in height.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Hose routed per Samsung install spec

diagnostic_steps.description: Run Calibration Mode (Temp + Delay End 3 sec → Cb → Start).
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Tub rotates in calibration or shows En/End

diagnostic_steps.description: If no spin after calibration, test motor engagement in spin cycle.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Motor hums without drum rotation → motor fault

diagnostic_steps.description: Reroute hall harness and apply ferrite per bulletin

historical_resolutions.description: Harness reroute per Samsung TB; 4E resolved on spin
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Technician closed per OEM bulletin TB-SAM-WF45-2026-07.

historical_resolutions.description: Harness reroute per Samsung TB; 4E resolved on spin
Harness reroute per Samsung TB; 4E resolved on spin
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Warranty claim closed using OEM bulletin TB-SAM-WF45-2026-07.

model.name: Samsung 4.5 cu. ft. Front Load Washer

error_codes.description: Water supply error — inlet valve or pressure
Drain error — filter, hose, or pump

symptoms.description: OE error — drain pump fault
DE error — door lock fault
UE unbalanced load repeated aborts
LG washer OE error on drain after pump replacement with revised pump

failure_modes.name: Drain Pump Blockage or Failure
failure_modes.description: Pump cannot evacuate water; OE displayed.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Drain residual water before pump service.

failure_modes.name: Door Lock Mechanism Fault
failure_modes.description: Door switch or lock assembly fails DE code.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Do not force door when locked.

failure_modes.name: Motor Stator or Rotor Fault
failure_modes.description: Direct drive motor fails spin after balance attempts.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Professional service for DD motor.

failure_modes.name: Revised Drain Pump Air Gap (Bulletin)
failure_modes.description: LG bulletin: revised pump needs air-gap hose orientation to avoid OE.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Follow OEM bulletin PPE and isolation steps.

diagnostic_steps.description: Clean drain pump filter and foreign object trap.
Test door lock latch engagement and wiring harness.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: DE clears; door locks at start

diagnostic_steps.description: Run tub clean cycle; redistribute load for UE test.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Spin completes or motor fault isolated

diagnostic_steps.description: Orient discharge hose and clip per LG bulletin photo

historical_resolutions.description: Reoriented hose/clip; OE cleared
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Technician closed per OEM bulletin TB-LG-WM4000-2026-07.

historical_resolutions.description: Reoriented hose/clip; OE cleared
Reoriented hose/clip; OE cleared
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Warranty claim closed using OEM bulletin TB-LG-WM4000-2026-07.

model.name: LG 4.5 cu. ft. Ultra Large Smart Washer

symptoms.description: Standing water in tub after cycle
Dishes not drying; water not heating
AE or E1 leak protection triggered
Long cycle or delayed wash time
LG dishwasher HE error after summer humidity spike

failure_modes.name: Drain Obstruction / OE Condition
failure_modes.description: Drain hose kinked, disposal knockout not removed, or pump blocked.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Disconnect power before checking drain.

failure_modes.name: Inadequate Water Fill / IE Condition
failure_modes.description: Water valve closed, low pressure <20 PSI, or siphoning drain install.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Verify 20-120 PSI water pressure.

failure_modes.name: Heater or Thermistor Fault / HE
failure_modes.description: Heating element open or water overheated above 149°F.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Allow cool-down before service.

failure_modes.name: Vario Motor / Spray Arm Fault / nE
failure_modes.description: Spray arm motor or wiring harness issue.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Do not run with obstructed spray arms.

diagnostic_steps.description: Check drain hose for kinks; verify disposal knockout removed.
Confirm water supply on, 20+ PSI, inlet hose not kinked.
Power cycle breaker 10s; rerun cycle to clear HE/PF.
Inspect door gasket seal for E1/AE overfill trigger.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Gasket intact; no obstructions at door

diagnostic_steps.description: Measure NTC vs bulletin chart; replace if out of band

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced NTC per humidity bulletin; HE gone
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Technician closed per OEM bulletin TB-LG-LDF-2026-07.

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced NTC per humidity bulletin; HE gone

error_codes.description: Drain error — hose, pump, or disposal connection

symptoms.description: LC or LE leak error code displayed
Dishes not clean; low water spray
OC or 0C over-level water error
Samsung dishwasher LC leak code with no visible water

failure_modes.name: Drain Hose / Sump Obstruction
failure_modes.description: Food debris blocking drain path or check valve.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Disconnect power; towel sump area.

failure_modes.name: WaterWall Motor or Track Fault
failure_modes.description: Spray arm not traversing tub length.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Check for obstructions on track.

failure_modes.name: Inlet Valve Overfill / LC Leak
failure_modes.description: Inlet valve stuck open or float leak sensor wet.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Shut water supply immediately on LC.

failure_modes.name: Condensation on Floor Sensor (Bulletin)
failure_modes.description: Bulletin: condensation path hits leak sensor; foam seal kit issued.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Follow OEM bulletin PPE and isolation steps.

diagnostic_steps.description: Inspect drain hose and remove sump filter debris.
Verify WaterWall arm moves freely full stroke.
Dry leak sensor in pan; test inlet valve shuts off.
Install base foam seal and dry sensor per bulletin

historical_resolutions.description: Foam seal kit installed; LC cleared
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Technician closed per OEM bulletin TB-SAM-DW80-2026-07.

historical_resolutions.description: Foam seal kit installed; LC cleared

symptoms.description: Washer fills but will not agitate or spin
Lid lock flashing; cycle will not start
F9 E1 drain pump error code
Top-load washer F9 E1 after clutch kit revision C

failure_modes.name: Shift Actuator Failure
failure_modes.description: Actuator cannot shift transmission between agitate and spin.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Unplug before accessing console.

failure_modes.name: Lid Lock Assembly Fault
failure_modes.description: Lid lock fails to engage preventing cycle start.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Do not bypass lid lock.

failure_modes.name: Drain Pump Failure
failure_modes.description: Pump unable to evacuate water; F9 E1 displayed.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Check coin trap first.

failure_modes.name: Clutch Actuator Timing (Bulletin Rev C)
failure_modes.description: Whirlpool bulletin: rev C clutch needs actuator re-index after install.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Follow OEM bulletin PPE and isolation steps.

diagnostic_steps.description: Run automatic diagnostic mode from console.
Test lid lock engagement with lid closed.
Inspect coin trap and drain pump for obstruction.
Re-index actuator using bulletin gauge tool

historical_resolutions.description: Re-indexed actuator; F9 E1 resolved
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Technician closed per OEM bulletin TB-WHI-WTW-2026-07.

historical_resolutions.description: Re-indexed actuator; F9 E1 resolved

model.name: Whirlpool 4.3 cu. ft. Top Load Washer

symptoms.description: Clothes still damp after full cycle
d80 error — 80% vent blockage detected
d90 or d95 error — severe vent restriction
Dryer runs but no heat produced
LG dryer D80 with long dry times after lint housing redesign

failure_modes.name: Restricted Exhaust Duct / d80-d95
failure_modes.description: Lint buildup in duct or external vent hood blocked.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Clean lint filter and full duct run.

failure_modes.name: Flow Sensor Fault
failure_modes.description: Sensor reports false restriction or failed reading.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Verify duct is clear before replacing sensor.

failure_modes.name: Heating Element or Thermostat Failure
failure_modes.description: Open heating element or high-limit thermostat tripped.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Disconnect power; test element continuity.

failure_modes.name: Lint Housing Bypass Path (Bulletin)
failure_modes.description: Bulletin: redesigned housing can bypass filter; seal kit required.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Follow OEM bulletin PPE and isolation steps.

diagnostic_steps.description: Clean lint filter and inspect external vent hood flap opens.
Run duct blockage test; measure exhaust run length (<60 ft equivalent).
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: d80 clears or duct restriction found

diagnostic_steps.description: Inspect flow sensor harness and sensor port for lint packing.
Test heating element and thermostat with multimeter.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Element continuity OK or open circuit found

diagnostic_steps.description: Install housing seal and verify no bypass gaps

historical_resolutions.description: Seal kit installed; dry times normal
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Technician closed per OEM bulletin TB-LG-DLE-2026-07.

historical_resolutions.description: Seal kit installed; dry times normal

model.name: LG 7.4 cu. ft. Ultra Large Capacity Dryer

symptoms.description: Refrigerator section not cooling; freezer OK
22E error — evaporator fan fault
33E error — ice maker fan fault
Excessive frost in freezer compartment
Samsung fridge 22E after ice room fan bulletin kit

failure_modes.name: Evaporator Fan Motor Failure / 22E
failure_modes.description: Fan motor not circulating cold air to refrigerator section.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Unplug before accessing evaporator cover.

failure_modes.name: Ice Maker Fan or Duct Blockage / 33E
failure_modes.description: Ice room fan blocked by frost or motor failure.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Allow manual defrost if heavily iced.

failure_modes.name: Defrost Heater or Bi-Metal Failure
failure_modes.description: Defrost cycle not clearing evaporator frost buildup.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Extended defrost may be required before test.

failure_modes.name: Ice Room Fan Connector Polarization (Bulletin)
failure_modes.description: Samsung bulletin: kit fan connector polarity reverse causes 22E.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Follow OEM bulletin PPE and isolation steps.

diagnostic_steps.description: Verify condenser coils clean and doors seal properly.
Remove evaporator cover; test fan motor for obstruction/spin.
Inspect ice maker fan duct for ice blockage.
Force defrost mode; check heater continuity.
Verify connector keying and polarity marks per bulletin

historical_resolutions.description: Corrected polarity; 22E cleared
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Technician closed per OEM bulletin TB-SAM-RF28-2026-07.

historical_resolutions.description: Corrected polarity; 22E cleared

model.name: Samsung 28 cu. ft. French Door Refrigerator

symptoms.description: Oven ignites but won't stay lit or won't heat
Gas smell when oven on; weak ignition
F9 E0 error — oven temperature sensor fault
Surface burner won't light; clicking only
Range oven F9 E0 after igniter redesign

failure_modes.name: Weak or Failed Bake Igniter
failure_modes.description: Igniter glows insufficiently to open gas valve.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Shut gas supply before service.

failure_modes.name: Gas Valve or Safety Valve Fault
failure_modes.description: Valve does not open after igniter sequence.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Licensed gas technician required.

failure_modes.name: Oven Temperature Sensor Out of Range
failure_modes.description: RTD sensor reading triggers F9 E0.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Disconnect power before sensor swap.

failure_modes.name: Surface Igniter Electrode Fault
failure_modes.description: Spark electrode worn or misaligned on burner.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Ensure burner caps seated correctly.

diagnostic_steps.description: Observe bake igniter glow amp draw during ignition sequence.
Test oven temperature sensor resistance at room temp (~1080 ohms).
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Within spec or F9 E0 confirmed

diagnostic_steps.description: Inspect surface burner caps, ports, and spark electrode gap.
If igniter weak, replace igniter before gas valve.
Set control jumpers and verify igniter mA per chart

historical_resolutions.description: Jumpers set; bake ignition stable
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Technician closed per OEM bulletin TB-WHI-WFG-2026-07.

historical_resolutions.description: Jumpers set; bake ignition stable

symptoms.description: E24 drain error on display
Dishes not clean; low spray pressure
E01 pump failure code

failure_modes.name: Drain Hose Blockage / E24
failure_modes.description: Blocked drain hose or air gap.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Check installation per Bosch spec.

failure_modes.name: Circulation Pump Fault / E01
failure_modes.description: Main circulation pump failure.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Authorized service recommended.

failure_modes.name: Heat Exchanger Scaling
failure_modes.description: Hard water scale reducing heat transfer.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Recommend descale program.

failure_modes.name: Disposal Air Gap / High Loop Missing (Bulletin)
failure_modes.description: Bosch installation bulletin: missing high loop after disposal work causes E24.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Follow OEM bulletin PPE and isolation steps.

diagnostic_steps.description: Verify drain hose loop and air gap per install guide.
Run Bosch test program for pump operation.
Inspect heat exchanger and run machine care cycle.
Install high loop and confirm air gap per bulletin

historical_resolutions.description: High loop restored; E24 cleared
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Technician closed per OEM bulletin TB-BOS-SHP-2026-07.

symptoms.description: Microwave runs but does not heat food
Door error or won't start when door closed
Turntable not rotating
OTR microwave loud hum on high after magnetron service kit

failure_modes.name: Magnetron or HV Diode Failure
failure_modes.description: No microwave energy produced.
failure_modes.safety_notes: HV capacitor discharge required.

failure_modes.name: Door Switch Interlock Fault
failure_modes.description: Primary or monitor switch fails continuity.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Do not operate with faulty interlock.

failure_modes.name: Turntable Motor Failure
failure_modes.description: Coupler or motor not driving turntable.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Check coupler alignment first.

failure_modes.name: HV Diode Matching (Bulletin Kit)
failure_modes.description: GE bulletin: service kit diode must match HV transformer revision.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Follow OEM bulletin PPE and isolation steps.

diagnostic_steps.description: Heat 1 cup water 60 seconds; measure temperature rise.
Test door switch continuity with multimeter.
Inspect turntable coupler and motor shaft.
Verify diode/transformer revision pair per bulletin table

historical_resolutions.description: Installed matched diode; hum eliminated
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Technician closed per OEM bulletin TB-GE-JVM-2026-07.

symptoms.description: Ice maker not producing ice
Error code E07 on ice maker display
Ice bin never fills / harvest cycle incomplete
Only small cloudy ice cubes produced
Ice maker harvests empty trays after water filter change

failure_modes.name: Water Inlet Valve Failure
failure_modes.description: Inlet valve stuck closed; no water reaches the ice mold.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Shut off water supply before valve replacement.

failure_modes.name: Frozen Fill Tube
failure_modes.description: Fill tube iced over, blocking water fill into mold.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Allow thaw; do not force metal objects into tube.

failure_modes.name: Bin Full Sensor Fault
failure_modes.description: Sensor incorrectly reports bin full; harvest never starts.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Disconnect power before sensor service.

failure_modes.name: Post-Filter Airlock / Inlet Restriction (Bulletin)
failure_modes.description: OEM bulletin: airlock after filter swap prevents fill; purge procedure required.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Follow OEM bulletin PPE and isolation steps.

diagnostic_steps.description: Verify water supply and listen for inlet valve click during fill.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: No click / no water into mold

diagnostic_steps.description: Inspect fill tube for ice blockage.
Check bin full sensor continuity and alignment.
Run forced harvest cycle and observe mold fill level.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Mold remains dry or only partially fills

diagnostic_steps.description: Run bulletin purge cycle 3x after filter install; verify mold fill

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced inlet valve; ice production restored within 6 hours.
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Hard water scale on valve seat.

historical_resolutions.description: Purged line per FrostBite bulletin; harvest filled normally

failure_modes.description: Primary field failure for RoboClean Stick Vacuum Pro: Brush Roll Motor Overload.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Disconnect power before service.

failure_modes.name: Control Board Communication Fault
failure_modes.description: Secondary board/comms fault that can mimic primary symptoms.
failure_modes.safety_notes: ESD precautions when handling PCB.

failure_modes.name: Brush-Roll Stall Detection Too Sensitive (Bulletin)
failure_modes.description: Firmware bulletin: stall threshold too low on carpets; patch + brush clean procedure.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Follow OEM bulletin PPE and isolation steps.

diagnostic_steps.description: Confirm error E12 and recreate symptom: Loss of suction / brush roll stops.

Run self-test / forced cycle and capture sensor readings.

symptoms.description: Unit cools weakly and shuts off
Error code E41 on display

failure_modes.name: Condenser Fan Failure
failure_modes.description: Primary field failure for CoolAir Portable AC 12k BTU: Condenser Fan Failure.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Disconnect power before service.

failure_modes.name: Control Board Communication Fault
failure_modes.description: Secondary board/comms fault that can mimic primary symptoms.
failure_modes.safety_notes: ESD precautions when handling PCB.

failure_modes.name: Wet Filter Restriction / High Pressure (Bulletin)
failure_modes.description: CoolAir bulletin: reinstalling damp filter trips high-pressure E41.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Follow OEM bulletin PPE and isolation steps.

diagnostic_steps.description: Confirm error E41 and recreate symptom: Unit cools weakly and shuts off.

Run self-test / forced cycle and capture sensor readings.

symptoms.description: Dehumidifier runs but water tank never fills
Error code H3 frost sensor
Tank full indicator on with empty tank
Loud rattling during compressor pull-down
Room humidity stays high after continuous run

failure_modes.name: Evaporator Coil Frost / Defrost Sensor Failure
failure_modes.description: Frost sensor open/out of range; coil ices and collection stops.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Unplug unit before accessing evaporator. Coil fins are sharp; use gloves.

failure_modes.name: Tank Full Float Switch Stuck
failure_modes.description: Float hinge debris or stuck switch forces false tank-full shutdown.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Empty and dry tank before servicing float hinge.

failure_modes.name: Compressor Mount / Isolation Pad Wear
failure_modes.description: Worn isolation pads transmit vibration and rattling on start.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Support compressor when replacing pads; do not stress refrigerant lines.

failure_modes.name: Humidity Sensor Drift / Control Calibration
failure_modes.description: RH sensor offset causes early cut-out while room remains humid.
failure_modes.safety_notes: ESD care when handling control board harness connectors.

diagnostic_steps.description: Confirm ambient above 41°F / 5°C and air filter is clean.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Ambient OK; filter free of heavy dust

diagnostic_steps.description: Inspect evaporator for ice; test frost sensor resistance vs chart (H3).
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Sensor within chart range; coil free of ice after defrost

diagnostic_steps.description: Remove tank; manually actuate float switch and watch tank-full LED.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: LED follows float position; no false TF with empty tank

diagnostic_steps.description: Compare display RH to calibrated hygrometer; check sensor harness.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Display RH within ±5% of reference hygrometer

diagnostic_steps.description: Inspect compressor isolation pads for crush/tear; reseat mounts.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Pads intact; rattling reduced on pull-down

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced frost sensor after H3 and iced coil; collection resumed
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Baseline PIM resolution for hmd-001. Part hmd-001-p01

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced frost sensor after H3 and iced coil; tank fills normally
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Sensor open-circuit. Verified against service chart. Source: FSM field close.

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced tank float switch assembly; false TF cleared
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Float hinge debris. Cleaned tank rails. Source: FSM field close.

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced humidity sensor module; display RH matched reference within 3%
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Drifted RH sensor. Source: FSM field close for multi-source pack.

historical_resolutions.description: Approved frost sensor replacement under warranty after H3.
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Photo of iced coil provided. Sensor test failed. Source: Claims.

error_codes.description: Frost sensor fault / coil freeze risk

oem_sources.note: Authoritative SKU/model/BOM for DryZone HMD30 multi-source pack

symptoms.description: Machine will not heat or brew cycle never starts
Error code E05 boiler temperature sensor
Weak crema / low pressure during extraction
Water leaks from group head gasket
Pump runs continuously but no water to brew head

failure_modes.name: Boiler NTC Sensor Open / Out of Range
failure_modes.description: Boiler temperature sensor failed; control blocks heat and shows E05.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Unplug and cool boiler fully before opening chassis. Risk of scalding.

failure_modes.name: Brew Pump Failure / Cavitation
failure_modes.description: Vibration pump weak or air-locked; extraction pressure insufficient.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Depressurize boiler and empty water circuit before pump swap.

failure_modes.name: Group Head Gasket Wear
failure_modes.description: Silicone gasket hardened/torn; water bypasses portafilter seal.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Remove portafilter; avoid metal scrapers on group flange.

failure_modes.name: Inlet Solenoid Stuck Closed
failure_modes.description: Fill solenoid does not open; pump runs dry and boiler level drops.
failure_modes.safety_notes: Isolate water supply; residual pressure may spray.

diagnostic_steps.description: Confirm tank filled, water softener cartridge seated, and machine powered with ready light logic.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Tank full; power OK; no dry-run interlock

diagnostic_steps.description: Read error code; measure boiler NTC resistance vs service chart at ambient (E05 path).
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: NTC within chart ohms; E05 clears after sensor replacement if open

diagnostic_steps.description: Run water prime; listen for pump tone; check brew pressure gauge reaches 9 bar with blind basket.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Steady pump tone; ≥8 bar on blind basket

diagnostic_steps.description: Inspect group gasket for cracks/flattening; reseat portafilter and check for side spray.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Gasket pliable and flush; no side leak at brew

diagnostic_steps.description: Check inlet solenoid click with multimeter continuity during fill request.
diagnostic_steps.expected_outcome: Solenoid clicks/opens; tank level rises or line fills

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced boiler NTC after E05; heat and brew restored
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Baseline PIM resolution for esp-001. Part esp-001-p01

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced boiler NTC after E05; heat restored and first shot extracted
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Open sensor. Verified against ohms chart. Source: FSM.

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced group gasket; side spray stopped
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Gasket flattened. Source: FSM.

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced vibration pump; blind basket holds 9 bar
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Weak pump tone. Source: FSM multi-source pack.

historical_resolutions.description: Approved boiler NTC under warranty after E05 photo and ohms test.
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Customer video showed E05 at power-on. Source: Claims.

oem_sources.note: Authoritative SKU/model/BOM for BrewBar ESP15 multi-source NEW pack

claims.resolution_summary: Approved drain pump replacement under warranty.
Brush Roll Motor Assembly replaced under warranty.
Condenser Fan Motor replaced under warranty.
Oven Temperature Sensor replaced under warranty.
Cleared impeller debris and reseated pump per bulletin; E21 cleared
Replaced latch switch per CleanWave bulletin; dry cycle restored
Installed bulletin coupler kit; turntable continuous
Purged line per FrostBite bulletin; harvest filled normally
Harness reroute per Samsung TB; 4E resolved on spin
Approved frost sensor replacement under warranty after H3.
Approved boiler NTC under warranty after E05 photo and ohms test.
